cluster: Skipped annual vent and fan servicing leading to premature motor failure and crop loss

pillar_article.title: Skipped Greenhouse Vent & Fan Servicing: What Growers Miss Before Motor Failure

red_flags.red_flag: Non-sealed motor bearings in any greenhouse application (rapid failure due to moisture/dust)
Fixed-speed fans in greenhouses with fluctuating temperature/humidity demands
Proprietary fan or vent components with limited or expensive replacement parts
Lack of clear, manufacturer-provided maintenance schedule or service instructions
